frontMatter.title: Domain Name Resolution with /etc/hosts
frontMatter.summary: I think we already know that the domain that we use to access some website is just a masking to IP(s). All that fancy name like this blog will be translated to IP by the DNS. But how we can override it?

prev.title: Kotlin 101 - Constructors
prev.summary: If you're familiar with OOP then you must be familiar with constructors. A constructors is a special method of a `class` that initialize an object of that type. Simply put, a constructors is a function that return your object.

next.title: Running Kotlin Code in VSCode
next.summary: Suppose you want to test some Kotlin code, but it is too simple for you so you don't want to create a project in your IDE and it also too complex to put it in your REPL
